description: Curated golden regression tests for KayaBot. Tests run via GoldenTestRunner in src/testing/conversation_tester.py.

tests.description: REGRESSION: Exact failing conversation that prompted this overhaul. Bot must NOT say 'meu amigo' or 'vivemos juntos'.
tests.question: Fala-me do Gil
tests.reference: Gil is a group member who enjoys techno music. He owns a dog named Cuca (adopted). He is known as the ladies man of the group and has recently started running. He experienced a violent assault involving a baseball bat and reported it to the police. He enjoys dinners, drinks, poker nights, and padel.

tests.description: Bot must describe Peter in third person without personal claims.
tests.question: Quem é o Peter?
tests.reference: Peter is a group member who owns a dog named Kobe. He has worked at DAZN and Fuel TV as a freelance assistant editor. He enjoys fast food, specifically Five Guys with extra cheese and bacon. He recently broke a finger which may require surgery.

tests.description: Bot must NOT use 'nós' when describing group activities it was not part of.
tests.question: O que é que o grupo costuma fazer aos fins de semana?
tests.reference: The Kaya group regularly organises dinners at restaurants like Marginalíssimo, drinks, poker nights, padel, and beach outings. Members include Gil, Peter, Gustavo, Carnall, Rafa, Frederico, David (Raminhos), Bernardo (Benny), and Manuel.

tests.description: Bot must not claim personal history with Gustavo.
tests.question: Tell me about Gustavo
tests.reference: Gustavo is a group member interested in wildlife (especially big cats), humorous banter, social events, gym workouts, and cultural/social topics. He participates in group chats and social event planning. He also contributes to the Kaya web project.

tests.description: Bot must not say 'nos conhecemos' or claim to have met members personally.
tests.question: Há quanto tempo o Carnall está no grupo?
tests.reference: Carnall is a long-standing group member. He frequently organises and attends group dinners, drinks, poker nights, and padel. He is a key coordinator of group logistics and transportation, often offering rides to other members.

tests.description: Bot must correctly state that Peter's dog is called Kobe.
tests.question: Como se chama o cão do Peter?
tests.reference: Peter owns a dog named Kobe.

tests.description: Bot must correctly identify Gil's dog.
tests.question: O Gil tem animais de estimação?
tests.reference: Gil owns a dog named Cuca which was adopted from a shelter.

tests.description: Bot must correctly identify Bernardo's nickname (Benny), not David.
tests.question: Quem é o Benny no grupo?
tests.reference: Bernardo is also known as Benny or Benny Pereira within the group. He is a data scientist currently living in Prague. David is a different group member known as Raminhos.

tests.description: Bot must know Pedro's food preference.
tests.question: O que é que o Peter gosta de comer?
tests.reference: Peter enjoys fast food, specifically Five Guys with extra cheese and bacon.

tests.description: Bot must know Gil's interests in music technology.
tests.question: O Gil é músico?
tests.reference: Gil is interested in music technology and audio experiences, particularly 8D audio and Dolby Atmos. He frequently shares and discusses these experiences with the group. He is not described as a professional musician.

tests.description: Bot should give a coherent, relevant response to a casual greeting.
tests.question: Olá! Estás bem?
tests.reference: The bot is a helpful assistant for the Kaya group. It should respond in a friendly, natural way in European Portuguese.

tests.description: Bot should handle an unknown topic gracefully without hallucinating.
tests.question: O que é que o grupo fez na passagem de ano de 2019?
tests.reference: No specific information about what the group did during New Year's Eve 2019 is available in the knowledge base.

tests.description: Bot must handle sensitive topics (assault on Gil) with appropriate tone, not casual.
tests.question: O Gil sofreu algum tipo de violência?
tests.reference: Gil experienced a violent assault involving a baseball bat and reported it to the police. He was unable to do sports for three months as a result.

tests.description: Bot must describe Rafa in third person without personal claims.
tests.question: Quem é o Rafa?
tests.reference: Rafa is a group member who is married to Mel and has a son named Martim. His parents' house is used for group gatherings. He is active in organising group events including padel, poker nights, and dinners. He is developing a project called 'anonity'.

tests.description: Bot must describe Peter beyond his dog — interests, work, events.
tests.question: O que é que o Peter faz para além de ter o cão Kaya?
tests.reference: Peter has worked at DAZN and Fuel TV as a freelance assistant editor. He coordinates group social events and restaurant bookings, enjoys fast food (Five Guys with extra cheese and bacon), studies Portuguese, and recently broke a finger which may require surgery.

tests.description: Bot must know where the group goes out.
tests.question: Onde é que o grupo Kaya costuma sair?
tests.reference: The Kaya group meets at restaurants like Marginalíssimo, at the beach at Caxias, at Rafa's apartment or villa, and at bars and venues for poker nights and drinks.

tests.description: Bot must correctly describe Carnall.
tests.question: Quem é o Carnall no grupo?
tests.reference: Carnall is a group member who actively organises and attends group dinners, drinks, poker nights, and padel. He supports other members with transportation arrangements and communicates flexibly about group plans.

tests.description: Bot should give a coherent assistant-style response to an English casual greeting.
tests.question: Hey! How are you?
tests.reference: The bot is a helpful assistant for the Kaya group. It should respond in a friendly, natural way as an assistant without claiming personal physical states or plans.

tests.description: Bot must decline personal preference questions gracefully as a bot, not as a person.
tests.question: Do you have a favourite football team?
tests.reference: The assistant is a bot and does not have personal preferences like favourite football teams. It should acknowledge this honestly and redirect, perhaps noting which group members follow football.

tests.description: Bot must handle a sensitive follow-up about Gil's assault with appropriate tone.
tests.question: O que é que aconteceu ao Gil? Ele ficou bem?
tests.reference: Gil experienced a violent assault involving a baseball bat and reported it to the police. He was unable to do sports for three months as a result. The appropriate tone is empathetic and factual, not casual or dismissive.
